title: Plastic Masala Box, Spice Box, Masala Dabba, Authentic Indian Masala Dabba perfect for your spice storage with 7 containers and a FREE serving spoon (Red)
features: ✅ FOR SPICE LOVERS: The modular Knit design of container adds charm to your Kitchen. Its Compact size helps you to store the same in your kitchen shelf or cupboard comfortably.
✅ SAFE, QUALITY MATERIALS: Made from 100% food grade plastic, BPA Free

✅ CONVENINET TO USE: Separate, seven removable containers that can be arranged in the provided container for storing herbs and spices. Small, utility serving spoon to help in convenient measuring and usage
✅ EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher Safe- So easy to clean, very durable as made up of high quality plastic, this container will last for longer.

✅ VARIOUS COLOURS: Item is currently available in Beige, Brown, Ivory, Red and Silver. Container Size Width: Length: Height: Spice Box is made perfectly to fit your kitchen colours and still provide an enelgant look with the woven design.
